purpose: Demo-only Release 2 action/work queue, generic approval workflow, notification digest, dashboard-to-action, and export log data. No final technical, certification, legal, RBI, RLA, FFS, fit-for-operation, layak operasi, risk acceptance, or asset safety decision is represented.
sourceBasis: Master BPMN Workflow Pack/Addendum MVP+/UI UX Design Pack/Master FRD SRS Rev. 1
guardrails: Approvals are generic workflow state transitions only.
Dashboard cards route to filtered action lists.
Notifications are grouped digests to avoid alert fatigue.
Export logging records purpose, timestamp, user, scope, version, and approval status only.
